primitives.name: browser.screenshot
primitives.summary: Capture a true rendered screenshot where the host has browser-level authority.

primitives.name: browser.claimed_tabs.list
primitives.summary: List browser tabs already claimed by the actions.json extension.

primitives.name: browser.claimed_tabs.activate
primitives.summary: Focus an already-claimed browser tab and reconnect its actions.json runtime.

primitives.name: pointer.move
primitives.summary: Move a visible pointer affordance to viewport coordinates.

primitives.name: pointer.click
primitives.summary: Move visibly to viewport coordinates and perform a click.

primitives.name: pointer.double_click
primitives.summary: Move visibly to viewport coordinates and perform a double click.

primitives.name: pointer.drag
primitives.summary: Move visibly from one viewport point or locator to another while dragging.

primitives.name: viewport.scroll
primitives.summary: Scroll the current viewport by a visible delta.

primitives.name: storage.read_file
primitives.summary: Read a declared text file from the loaded actions.json storage bundle by path or file id.

id.description: Declared file id from actions.site mode=list files.

error.message: The bookmarklet/embed host does not expose storage.read_file in this runtime slice.

primitives.name: text.insert
primitives.summary: Insert text into the focused editable target or a requested editable locator.

target.description: Optional editable target locator. Omit to use the focused editable element.

primitives.name: keyboard.press
primitives.summary: Dispatch a page-level keyboard key or modifier chord to the focused element.

key.description: Key name, or a compact chord such as Meta+A, Control+A, or Shift+Enter.

primitives.name: transfer.insert
primitives.summary: Render a stored transfer item and insert it into a target editable element without resending the full payload through the model.

primitives.name: transfer.clear
primitives.summary: Clear one transfer item or all transfer items in the current session.

primitives.name: transfer.read
primitives.summary: Read transfer-buffer metadata or payload by label or id.

primitives.name: transfer.write
primitives.summary: Store text or structured JSON in the extension-local transfer buffer for cross-tab workflows.

primitives.name: clipboard.write
primitives.summary: Write text to the extension-approved clipboard or transfer surface when permission is available.

error.message: Clipboard primitives are not exposed in this runtime slice. Use transfer.write/read/insert for approved cross-tab transfer.

primitives.name: clipboard.read
primitives.summary: Read text from the extension-approved clipboard or transfer surface when permission is available.

error.message: Clipboard primitives are not exposed in this runtime slice. Use transfer.write/read/insert for approved cross-tab transfer.

primitives.name: runtime.session.name
primitives.summary: Name the current browser-control session for user-visible transparency.

error.message: runtime.session.name is not exposed by this runtime slice.

primitives.name: runtime.session.finalize_tabs
primitives.summary: Finalize browser tabs controlled during an authoring session.

error.message: runtime.session.finalize_tabs is not exposed by this runtime slice.

primitives.name: page.info
primitives.summary: Return basic information about the current page.

primitives.name: dom.observe.visible
primitives.summary: Observe visible DOM candidates that match a selector or text query.

primitives.name: dom.snapshot_text
primitives.summary: Return a text snapshot of visible page content.

primitives.name: dom.list_sections
primitives.summary: List rendered page sections with inferred headings, document offsets, viewport visibility, and optional item counts.

primitives.name: locator.element_info
primitives.summary: Resolve a locator to visible element geometry and a recommended clickable center.

primitives.name: locator.text_content
primitives.summary: Resolve a locator and return its visible text content.

primitives.name: locator.wait_for
primitives.summary: Wait for a locator to satisfy a visible or attached state.

primitives.name: overlay.open
primitives.summary: Render an agent-created HTML document in the authorized page overlay.

html.description: Inline HTML body or document markup to render inside the overlay. Use either html or template, not both.

template.description: Storage reference for a reusable overlay template. The runtime resolves it from the uploaded actions.json.storage bundle.

scope.description: Storage scope, such as public, private, or shared/name.

path.description: Path inside the scope, such as sites/example.com/overlays/report/template.html.

data.description: Optional storage reference for JSON data injected into a template as [data-actions-json-overlay-data]. Commonly private data with a public template.

title.description: Overlay title shown in the drag handle.

launchers.description: Optional visible-page buttons that reopen this overlay from a relevant DOM anchor.

id.description: Stable launcher id used to replace older buttons for the same overlay affordance.

label.description: Button text shown in the original page DOM.

selector.description: Single CSS selector hint for the element to place the button near.

selectors.description: Ordered CSS selector hints for the element to place the button near.

text_contains.description: Optional visible text filter for selected anchor candidates.

text_equals.description: Optional exact visible text filter for selected anchor candidates.

url_contains.description: Only install this launcher when the current page URL contains this string.

url_matches.description: Only install this launcher when the current page URL matches this regular expression.

primitives.name: overlay.register_launcher
primitives.summary: Register visible-page launcher buttons that can reopen an overlay later.

html.description: Inline HTML body or document markup to render later when a registered launcher is clicked. Use either html or template, not both.

template.description: Storage reference for a reusable overlay template. The runtime resolves it when the launcher opens.

scope.description: Storage scope, such as public, private, or shared/name.

path.description: Path inside the scope, such as sites/example.com/overlays/report/template.html.

data.description: Optional storage reference for JSON data injected into a template as [data-actions-json-overlay-data].

title.description: Overlay title shown when the launcher opens the overlay.

launchers.description: Visible-page buttons that reopen this overlay from a relevant DOM anchor.

id.description: Stable launcher id used to replace older buttons for the same overlay affordance.

label.description: Button text shown in the original page DOM.

selector.description: Single CSS selector hint for the element to place the button near.

selectors.description: Ordered CSS selector hints for the element to place the button near.

text_contains.description: Optional visible text filter for selected anchor candidates.

text_equals.description: Optional exact visible text filter for selected anchor candidates.

url_contains.description: Only install this launcher when the current page URL contains this string.

url_matches.description: Only install this launcher when the current page URL matches this regular expression.

primitives.name: overlay.close
primitives.summary: Close the current actions.json overlay if one exists.
